name: antigravity-for-claude-code
description: Run the Antigravity CLI (Gemini) as a collaborating AI inside Claude Code, with intelligent model routing across the SDLC.

plugins.name: antigravity
plugins.description: Hybrid Claude Code + Antigravity (Gemini) workflow: Claude conducts requirements/architecture/the hard 20%/verification, and routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, tests, first-pass review, migrations, web/Vertex AI Search) to Antigravity. Lower token cost as a financial lever.
